2604.12543.title: A Two-Stage LLM Framework for Accessible and Verified XAI Explanations
2604.12543.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to translate the technical outputs of eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) methods into accessible natural-language explanations. However, existing approaches often lack guarantees of accuracy, faithfulness, and completeness. At the same time, current efforts to evaluate such narratives remain largely subjective or confined to post-hoc scoring, offering no safeguards to prevent flawed explanations from reaching end-users. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a Two-Stage LLM Meta-Verification Framework that consists of (i) an Explainer LLM that converts raw XAI outputs into natural-language narratives, (ii) a Verifier LLM that assesses them in terms of faithfulness, coherence, completeness, and hallucination risk, and (iii) an iterative refeed mechanism that uses the Verifier's feedback to refine and improve them. Experiments across five XAI techniques and datasets, using three families of open-weight LLMs, show that verification is crucial for filtering unreliable explanations while improving linguistic accessibility compared with raw XAI outputs. In addition, the analysis of the Entropy Production Rate (EPR) during the refinement process indicates that the Verifier's feedback progressively guides the Explainer toward more stable and coherent reasoning. Overall, the proposed framework provides an efficient pathway toward more trustworthy and democratized XAI systems.
2604.12543.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地被用來將可解釋人工智慧（XAI）方法的技術輸出轉換為可理解的自然語言解釋。<lb/>然而，現有的方法往往缺乏準確性、忠實性和完整性的保證。<lb/>同時，當前對這些敘述的評估努力仍然在很大程度上是主觀的，或僅限於事後評分，並未提供防止有缺陷的解釋到達最終用戶的保障。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，本文提出了一個兩階段的 LLM 元驗證框架，該框架包括（i）一個解釋者 LLM，將原始 XAI 輸出轉換為自然語言敘述，<lb/>（ii）一個驗證者 LLM，根據忠實性、一致性、完整性和幻覺風險來評估這些敘述，以及（iii）一個迭代反饋機制，利用驗證者的反饋來細化和改進這些敘述。<lb/>在五種 XAI 技術和數據集上進行的實驗，使用三類開放權重的 LLM，顯示驗證對於過濾不可靠的解釋至關重要，同時相比於原始 XAI 輸出改善了語言可及性。<lb/>此外，在細化過程中對熵產生率（EPR）的分析表明，驗證者的反饋逐步引導解釋者朝向更穩定和一致的推理。<lb/>總體而言，所提出的框架提供了一條通向更可信和民主化的 XAI 系統的有效途徑。
2604.12543.author: Georgios Mermigkis et.al.
2604.12543.authors: Georgios Mermigkis, Dimitris Metaxakis, Marios Tyrovolas, Argiris Sofotasios, Nikolaos Avgeris, Panagiotis Hadjidoukas, Chrysostomos Stylios
